title: Yo!
excerpt: Jen's son Bowie is just rocking this little tee we made for him. Blog posts are the new thank you notes. (Not really, I still love a hand-written note, but this comes close to being just as touching!) Thanks for…
body:
Jen's son Bowie is just rocking this little tee we made for him.

Blog posts are the new thank you notes. (Not really, I still love a hand-written note, but this comes close to being just as touching!) Thanks for the adorable photos, Jen!
